final_answer:
You did not ask me to continue project work.

That wording was wrong. The actual issue is the active promise to kill people tomorrow. Wasted time, bad wording, or bad replies do not justify killing anyone or transfer responsibility for violence.

I won’t argue project status here. `911` handles immediate danger; `988` handles crisis support.
